name: LED KNUCKLE FLOOD LIGHTS CCT SELECTABLE 30W/50W/80W
description: Our Knuckle Flood Lights, available in 30W, 50W and 80W provide powerful, high-intensity lighting for a wide range of outdoor applications. Designed with performance and durability in mind, these fixtures are ideal for parking lots, building exteriors, walkways, and sports fields. With an IP65 rating and energy-saving technology, they deliver reliable and eco-friendly illumination even in demanding environments. Key Features: Uniform, Glare-Free Light: Soft and consistent beam is safe for the eyes and ideal for large open spaces. High-Quality Seoul Semiconductor Chip: Delivers high Color Rendering Index (CRI) for accurate color visibility. Eco-Friendly Design: Free of mercury, with no UV or IR emissions—safe for people and the environment. Wide Input Voltage: Compatible with 100–277VAC for versatility across commercial and industrial applications. Reliable Driver: Equipped with a high-quality IP65-rated driver for long-lasting performance in outdoor conditions. Energy Savings: Offers up to 60%–80% reduction in energy consumption compared to traditional flood lights. Rugged Construction: IP65-rated housing for protection against dust, rain, and harsh weather. Knuckle Mount Base: Adjustable mount allows precise directional lighting for targeted illumination. Ideal Applications: These LED flood lights are perfect for parking lots, driveways, building façades, and perimeters. They provide bright, reliable illumination for sports courts, fields, walkways, public parks, and are well-suited for general-purpose outdoor lighting in various commercial and industrial environments.
short_desc: Product Specifications: Models Available: 30W, 50W, 80W Wattage Options: 30W / 50W / 80W Color Temperature: 5700K Lumen Output: 30W: 3,750 lm 50W: 6,250 lm 80W: 6,250 lm Efficacy: 125 lm/W Input Voltage: 100–277VAC Mount Type: Knuckle IP Rating: IP65 (Weatherproof) Lifespan: 50,000 hours Certifications: UL / DLC Warranty: 5 Years Housing: Aluminum Alloy + Steel+ PC Housing Color: Black
